allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import ast, sys; import analyzer; print\('analyzer OK'\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import ast; src = open\('analyzer.py'\).read\(\); ast.parse\(src\); print\('analyzer AST OK'\)")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import ast, sys; [ast.parse\(open\(f\).read\(\)\) or print\(f, 'OK'\) for f in ['main.py','components/navbar.py','components/sidebar.py','pages/scripts_page.py','pages/add_script_page.py','pages/script_detail_page.py','pages/script_viewer_page.py','pages/home_history_page.py']]")
